example: She just finished her training at the company.
I need to check my bank account balance.
You have a balance due of $26 on your account.
The company decided to waive the late fee.
Your services will be suspended until payment is made.
She berated the customer service representative over the phone.
The call was escalated to the manager for further assistance.
The supervisor handled the complaint professionally.
ja: 監督者、スーパーバイザー

example: She requested an extension on her account payment deadline.
The company decided to reinstate her canceled account.
ja: 復職させる、復活させる

example: Please be respectful when speaking with customer service.
Disrespect towards staff will not be tolerated.
You will be placed back in the queue to wait.
The customer service representative helped me resolve the issue.
ja: カスタマーサービス担当者

example: The call center agent answered my questions promptly.
ja: コールセンターの担当者
